subject: You're in — {{session.name}} on {{session.date}}
body:
Hi {{client.firstName}},

Your booking is confirmed for {{session.name}} with {{instructor.name}} on {{session.date}} at {{session.time}} ({{session.location}}).

Show the QR code in your account at check-in.

Namaste,
Yoga Sadhana

subject: Booking cancelled — {{session.name}}
body:
Hi {{client.firstName}},

Your booking for {{session.name}} on {{session.date}} has been cancelled. Your credit has been returned.

See you soon,
Yoga Sadhana

subject: Thanks for your purchase — {{product.name}}
body:
Hi {{client.firstName}},

Thanks for purchasing {{product.name}}. You now have {{package.creditsRemaining}} credits, valid until {{package.expiresAt}}.

Book your first class anytime.

Yoga Sadhana

subject: 30 days left on your {{product.name}}
body:
Hi {{client.firstName}},

Your {{product.name}} expires on {{package.expiresAt}} — 30 days from now. You still have {{package.creditsRemaining}} credits to use.

Yoga Sadhana

subject: 15 days left on your {{product.name}}
body:
Hi {{client.firstName}},

Half a month left on your {{product.name}} — {{package.creditsRemaining}} credits remaining.

Yoga Sadhana

subject: 7 days left on your {{product.name}}
body:
Hi {{client.firstName}},

One week until your {{product.name}} expires. {{package.creditsRemaining}} credits left.

Yoga Sadhana

subject: Tomorrow: your {{product.name}} expires
body:
Hi {{client.firstName}},

Your {{product.name}} expires tomorrow. {{package.creditsRemaining}} credits remaining.

Yoga Sadhana

subject: 12 hours left on your {{product.name}}
body:
Hi {{client.firstName}},

Final countdown — 12 hours left on your {{product.name}}. {{package.creditsRemaining}} credits remaining.

Yoga Sadhana

subject: Expiring in 2 hours — {{product.name}}
body:
Hi {{client.firstName}},

Your {{product.name}} expires in 2 hours. Last call on {{package.creditsRemaining}} credits.

Yoga Sadhana

subject: We've got your private session request
body:
Hi {{client.firstName}},

We've received your private-session request. We'll confirm within 12 hours.

Yoga Sadhana

subject: Confirmed — private session on {{session.date}}
body:
Hi {{client.firstName}},

Your private session with {{instructor.name}} is confirmed for {{session.date}} at {{session.time}} ({{session.location}}).

Namaste,
Yoga Sadhana

subject: Couldn't fit your requested private session
body:
Hi {{client.firstName}},

We couldn't accommodate your request. Reason: {{decline.reason}}. Reply to this email and we'll find another slot.

Yoga Sadhana

subject: Please re-sign our updated waiver
body:
Hi {{client.firstName}},

We've updated our studio waiver. Please sign the new version before your next class.

Yoga Sadhana

subject: Tomorrow: {{session.name}}
body:
Hi {{client.firstName}},

Reminder: {{session.name}} is tomorrow at {{session.time}} ({{session.location}}). See you there.

Yoga Sadhana
